title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down a four-pillar system for AI use observed in Alex Hormozi's business operations: data as competitive moat, voice-first prioritization, workflow decomposition, and compound effects. The analysis includes a cautionary example of a company-wide mistake that required intervention from leadership.
